response.global_analysis: The video features three songs performed by virtual characters. The first song, 'Kinmokusei', is performed by a mascot character. The second, 'Hoshizora e to Tsuzuku Sakamichi', is also by the mascot. The third, 'Isekai Kyousoukyoku', is performed by Shirakami Fubuki. On-screen text provided the primary source for lyrics and spelling, especially for song titles and guest introductions. Subtitles are synchronized to the vocal audio and follow the visual text precisely. Confirming that all vocals have been transcribed and translated without early cutoffs.

subtitles.original: 都合良いね、涙が出るの
subtitles.english: Convenient, isn't it? Tears are falling

subtitles.original: ああ　どれだけ歌っても
subtitles.english: Ah, no matter how much I sing

subtitles.original: この声は君には届かない
subtitles.english: This voice will never reach you

subtitles.original: ああ　どれだけ歌っても
subtitles.english: Ah, no matter how much I sing

subtitles.original: この声は君には届かない
subtitles.english: This voice will never reach you

subtitles.original: ああ　息が苦しくなる
subtitles.english: Ah, it's getting hard to breathe

subtitles.original: この歌もいつしか終わりが来る
subtitles.english: This song too will eventually end

subtitles.original: ああ　息が苦しくなる
subtitles.english: Ah, it's getting hard to breathe

subtitles.original: この地球もいつかは終わりが来る
subtitles.english: This world too will one day end

subtitles.original: 金木犀の匂いをまた
subtitles.english: Once again, the scent of fragrant olive...

subtitles.original: 思い出した
subtitles.english: ...reminded me

subtitles.original: 気付けば　駆けだしていた
subtitles.english: By the time I noticed, I was running

subtitles.original: 揺れ動く　心のままに
subtitles.english: Following my swaying heart

subtitles.original: 遠ざかる　白い壁
subtitles.english: The white wall receding further away

subtitles.original: 一度も　振り返らずに
subtitles.english: Without looking back even once

subtitles.original: 《生命》が　消え逝く季節の
subtitles.english: In the season where life fades away

subtitles.original: 胸を刺す　気配の中で
subtitles.english: Amidst the air that stabs at my chest

subtitles.original: 迫りくる　暗闇
subtitles.english: The encroaching darkness

subtitles.original: 二度と　明けないような気がして
subtitles.english: Feeling as if dawn would never come again

subtitles.original: 転がり落つそな心
subtitles.english: A heart that feels like it's falling

subtitles.original: 必死に抱き止めていた
subtitles.english: I was desperately holding on to it

subtitles.original: 星空へと続く長い坂道は
subtitles.english: The long path leading to the starry sky

subtitles.original: 永遠にも　思えたから
subtitles.english: Seemed like it could last forever

subtitles.original: 咲花や　散りぬるを
subtitles.english: Like blooming flowers that eventually scatter

subtitles.original: 神代の《時代》より繰り返す
subtitles.english: Repeating since the era of the gods

subtitles.original: 私はそれを　美しいとは
subtitles.english: I have never, ever thought...

subtitles.original: 思ったことがない
subtitles.english: ...that such a thing was beautiful

subtitles.original: 久方の　春の陽を
subtitles.english: The long-awaited spring sunlight

subtitles.original: 仮初めの影が奪い合う
subtitles.english: Fought over by fleeting shadows

subtitles.original: その営みを　美しいとは
subtitles.english: I have never, ever thought...

subtitles.original: 思ったことがない
subtitles.english: ...that such a cycle was beautiful

subtitles.original: 諦めながら　生きてた
subtitles.english: I lived my life while giving up

subtitles.original: 何も望まないように　それでも
subtitles.english: Wishing for nothing, yet even so

subtitles.original: 手放せなかった
subtitles.english: I couldn't let it go

subtitles.original: 最後の願いを　握りしめて
subtitles.english: Clutching my final wish

subtitles.original: 駆け上がる
subtitles.english: I run up the hill

subtitles.original: 尾丸ポルカ
subtitles.english: Omaru Polka

subtitles.original: 猫又おかゆ
subtitles.english: Nekomata Okayu

subtitles.original: 大神ミオ
subtitles.english: Ookami Mio

subtitles.original: 天音かなた
subtitles.english: Amane Kanata

subtitles.original: さくらみこ
subtitles.english: Sakura Miko

subtitles.original: 鷹嶺ルイ
subtitles.english: Takane Lui

subtitles.original: フワワ・アビスガード　モココ・アビスガード
subtitles.english: Fuwawa Abyssgard & Mococo Abyssgard

subtitles.original: 白上フブキ
subtitles.english: Shirakami Fubuki

subtitles.original: 我武者羅に生きるお前が笑われて
subtitles.english: You, living recklessly, were mocked

subtitles.original: 楽に生きる奴らが徳をする世界で
subtitles.english: In a world where those who live easy prosper

subtitles.original: 我だけはお前のことを笑わない
subtitles.english: I alone will not laugh at you

subtitles.original: 皆が指差し笑おうとも我は笑わない
subtitles.english: Even if everyone points and laughs, I will not laugh

subtitles.original: ああ人は滅んでゆく　綻んでゆく
subtitles.english: Ah, people perish, they fall apart

subtitles.original: 才を妬み合い富を奪い合い
subtitles.english: Envying talents and stealing wealth

subtitles.original: ああ人は滅んでゆく　綻んでゆく
subtitles.english: Ah, people perish, they fall apart

subtitles.original: その果てに見えた海は
subtitles.english: The sea I saw at the end of it all...

subtitles.original: 地獄だろうか？それとも地獄だろうか？
subtitles.english: ...is it hell? Or is it hell?

subtitles.original: 我武者羅に生きるお前が笑われて
subtitles.english: You, living recklessly, were mocked

subtitles.original: 楽に生きる奴らが徳をする世界で
subtitles.english: In a world where those who live easy prosper

subtitles.english: I alone will not laugh at you
